title: Teleporter
description: Teleport from one location to another, back and forth!
body:
1.21.8 now supported!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DZ59qVS98yg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Teleport back and forth, even between dimensions!**
This mod allows you to link up two portals (using a stick), then travel between them.
# **Crafting Recipe**
![An image of a Minecraft crafting recipe, using copper ingots, redstone and obsidian to make two teleporter blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f4d6ba4c86664e62c0ba7343a188023dfc5eda.png)
